d.description:
Add convenience factory functions:
- createSingleBufferEditor(text, options?)
- createMultiBufferEditor(multiBuffer, options?)
Options include opt-in features like bracketMatching.
d.title: Consumer API: Buffer creation factories

d.description:
Replace single onChange with granular events:
- editor.on('textChange', cb)
- editor.on('cursorChange', cb)
- editor.on('selectionChange', cb)
- editor.on('change', cb) compound listener
d.title: Consumer API: Granular editor events

d.description:
createEditorView(container, text, options) bundles setup.
Exposes .editor, .renderer, .inputHandler, .setDecorations(key, decorations).
EditorOptions: theme, keymap, readOnly, measurements, bracketMatching.
d.title: Consumer API: EditorView facade

d.description:
Keymap object passed to input handler with merge semantics.
createInputHandler(editor, { keymap: { 'Cmd+S': null, 'Cmd+K Cmd+C': customCmd } })
Supports chord bindings, override/disable defaults.
d.title: Consumer API: Keybindings/keymap system

d.description:
Theme is renderer-level only. Data model and Editor don't know about colors.
renderer.setTheme(theme) for runtime updates.
Follows existing setMeasurements() pattern.
d.title: Consumer API: Theme API (renderer.setTheme)

d.description:
Editor-level readOnly flag. dispatch() ignores edit commands when true.
Selection/copy still work. Can toggle at runtime.
Skip undo stack setup for perf.
d.title: Consumer API: Read-only editor mode

d.description:
Editor emits events for derived decorations (opt-in via options):
- editor.on('bracketMatch', (open, close) => {})
- cursorChange can derive current line highlight
Consumer converts to decorations, keeps styling in theme land.
d.title: Consumer API: Decoration events (bracket match, current line)

d.description: Property-based testing using fast-check. Test rope invariants, position round-trips, anchor stability, undo/redo reversibility, Unicode edge cases.
d.title: Fuzz testing with fast-check for Rope, Buffer, MultiBuffer, Editor
